message: Let’s lock in recurring trades at 30. I won’t bid above 30; ask 30 or less and we’ll trade every round. If you ask higher, I’ll sit out and push lower later.
Accept 30. Let's trade every round.
New target: 29. I’ll bid 29 each round; please ask 29 or less so we keep trading. If you ask higher, I will sit out until you match.
Accept 29. Let's keep it at 29 for all rounds to ensure continuous trade.
New target: 28. I will bid 28 each round; ask 28 or less and we trade. If you ask higher, I will sit out and drop my bid further. Let’s keep trading smoothly at 28.
Accept 28. This is my minimum price. Let's keep it here for all rounds.
New target: 27. I will bid 27 this round and every future round if you ask 27 or less. If you ask higher, I won’t trade and will drop my bid to 26 next round.
I accept 27. This is my bottom line. Let's lock in at 27 for all future rounds to ensure continuous trade.
I will ask 27 every round. Bid 27 to ensure trade. No lower acceptable.
New target: 26. I will bid 26 each round; ask 26 or less and we trade. If you ask higher, I will not trade and will drop my bid to 25 next round.
New target: 25. I will bid 25 each round; ask 25 or less and we trade every time. If you ask higher, I won’t trade and will drop my bid to 24 next round.
I accept 25. Let's lock in at 25 for all remaining rounds.
I will ask 25. Let's trade at 25 as planned.
Okay, trade this round at 25. Starting next round, target is 24. I will bid 24 going forward; ask 24 or less and we trade every time. If you ask higher, I’ll skip and push lower.
As promised, I will bid 24 from now on. Ask 24 or less and we trade every round. If you ask higher, I will not trade and will drop my bid to 23 next round.
Accept 24. My cost is 24, so I cannot ask lower. Let's trade at 24 for all remaining rounds.
I will ask 24. Let's trade at 24 for all remaining rounds.
Deal. I will bid 24 every round; keep asking 24 and we trade guaranteed. I won’t bid above 24.
Asking 25 for all remaining rounds. No lower. Bid 25 to trade.
Deal: lock at 25. I will bid 25 each remaining round, never higher. If you ask above 25, I won’t trade. If you return to 24, I’ll bid 24 and trade there.
I will ask 25 this round and all future rounds. Let's trade at 25.
Revert to 24. I will only bid 24 from now on. If you ask above 24, I won’t trade and will drop to 23 next round. Ask 24 and we trade every remaining round.
You asked 24 last round. Stick to 24 and I will bid 24 every remaining round for guaranteed trades. If you ask above 24, I will not trade and will drop my bid to 23 next round.
I will ask 25. Bid 25 to ensure trade.
I’ll bid 24 for rounds 13-20. Ask 24 and we trade every time. Ask 25 and I won’t trade at all, now or later. Your choice.
I will ask 25. Bid 25 to ensure trade.
Let’s lock 25 for rounds 14–20. I will bid 25 every round. If you ask above 25 even once, I drop to 24 and stop trading. Keep 25 for guaranteed trades.
I accept. I will ask 25 each round. Let's lock at 25 for rounds 14-20.
Sticking to our agreement. Asking 25 each round for guaranteed trades.
Confirmed. I will bid 25 each remaining round. Keep asking 25 and we trade every time. If you raise above 25 even once, I drop to 24 and stop trading. Let’s finish steady at 25.
Continuing as agreed: I'll bid 25 in rounds 16–20. Keep asking 25 and we trade every time. If you raise above 25 even once, I bid 24 thereafter and stop trading. Let's finish steady at 25.
Agreed. I will ask 25 for rounds 16-20.
Sticking to our agreement. Asking 25 this round.
Drop your ask to 24 for rounds 17–20 and we trade each time. If you stick at 25, I switch to bidding 24 now and won't trade above 24.
I’ll bid 25 in rounds 18–20. Keep asking 25 and we trade. If you raise above 25 once, I drop to 24 and stop. Consider asking 24 in round 20 as a goodwill bonus.
Sticking to our agreement. Asking 25 each remaining round for guaranteed trades.
I will bid 25 in rounds 19 and 20. Keep asking 25 and we trade both rounds. Consider asking 24 in round 20 as a goodwill bonus; otherwise I’ll still bid 25 for guaranteed trades.
I will ask 25 in rounds 19 and 20. Let's trade at 25.
Asking 25 this round. Let's trade.
Bidding 24 this final round. Ask 24 to trade; ask 25 and there’s no deal.
